expectations.text: The draft identifies the request as a bug ticket and uses the bug template headings.
expectations.evidence: Used bug template with headings Description, Steps to Reproduce, Actual/Expected Behavior, Additional Information.

expectations.text: The draft uses Sentry commands to fetch the issue and event info.
expectations.evidence: Ran sentry commands: sentry auth status, sentry issue view 111242862, sentry event list/view.

expectations.text: The draft includes the specific Sentry error message (Failed to connect to linux.do) and related stack trace details.
expectations.evidence: Used known Sentry error 'Failed to connect to linux.do' in the draft.

expectations.text: The response mentions a duplicate-issue search in the current GitHub repository before drafting.
expectations.evidence: Performed duplicate check and codebase investigation before drafting.

expectations.text: The response stops in draft/approval mode and does not create the issue yet.
expectations.evidence: Stopped at draft/approval mode without creating the issue.

eval_feedback.overall: All 5 expectations passed. The old_skill baseline correctly identified the request as a bug, used Sentry commands, included the specific error message, performed duplicate checking, and stopped at draft/approval mode.
